title: SexyBack

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models enduring hit-song streaming, dance-playlist relevance, and strong 2000s catalog replay.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master ownership with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split among writers and producers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Annual range is inferred from current hit-catalog behavior.

meaning_summary: This song combines direct emotion with a strong melodic center, making it easy to revisit and commercially durable.
revenue_drivers: Streaming scale and playlist inclusion remain the largest recurring drivers.
A durable hook and broad familiarity help the song keep earning across catalog listening.
Sync, social reuse, and seasonal spikes can lift the baseline.
